title: Deckcraft Server (Controlify)
description: The performance your Steam Deck needed
body:
# If anyone wants to take over please reach out on discord (loaf0002)

"The modpack(s) your Steam Deck needed"

While we're not with them, you should also check out [Deckcraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/deckcraft). This is the only reason on why I made the modpack.

### **What happened?**

Next update happens when 1.20.5 is out.

If you're seeing this you most likely seen this modpack before, I'm just changing stuff with it so that the updates **actually** work instead of going "ooh new client update buh bye server"

Don't expect each modpack to have the same mods, I work on them separately.

As said above, this is the modpack(s) your Steam Deck needed. It focuses on mods and performance. Beta may cause issues with your Steam Deck so use at your own risk.
Now with server support! (most likely bugs)

If for some reason you prefer curseforge, that's fine because Deck Craft is also coming to there. (Not recommended), old versions will stay here.

Want a mod added? Request it in the issues tab by having "REQUEST" without the quotes as the title and then why you want the mod in the section for explaining why it 'crashed'  added and fully tested to make sure it doesn't crash.

Basically "REQUEST" as title, no quotes and explain why in the funny box at the bottom

Forge is no longer supported. It may change.

Controlify is half supported, updates more rarely when I feel like it. It's just impossible for me to test in desktop mode

Shaders? Yes.
![A steam deck running B S L shaders at 36 f p s, staring at the sun in minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qYUsxvBA/images/be473a4cffb69e6fa298d50ad5e133e4db821bd0.png)
(BSL at default settings)

Features:
- Shaders I know that run well on default settings
- Midnight Controls ~~or Controlify, Pick one~~
- Sodium, Lithium and Iris for performance
- ~~Forge Support~~
- Quilt Support


Shaders Tested:
- BSL Shaders: Good (7 Chunks and Simulation distance makes it perfect 80 fps)
- Complementary Reimagined: Good
- Complementary Unbound: Good
- Rethinking Voxels (Removed from shaders): Bad
- Solas Shader: Good

**We are, in no way afilliated with Valve in any type or form.**
